arts.ttl: 'He gets compared to Jorginho': Man City expert names four academy stars who could play vs. Watford
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany tells Sports Mole which academy stars, including one compared to Jorginho, could play for Pep Guardiola's senior side in Tuesday's EFL Cup clash with Watford.

arts.ttl: Rodri's season-ending injury just made Man City, Pep Guardiola's job so much harder
arts.sum: Losing the influential midfielder to a potentially season-ending injury is a huge blow to Manchester City's fortunes this season. Can Pep Guardiola & Co. overcome it to win the league?

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel sends hostile warning to Erling Haaland and Man City team-mates
arts.sum: Arsenal claimed a share of the spoils at Manchester City on Sunday in a controversial and bad-tempered affair between the two Premier League title hopefuls

arts.ttl: Piers Morgan slams 'nasty' Man City star after incident with Arsenal teenager
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland was at the heart of things as his side battled back to secure a point against Arsenal and has since made headlines for his post-match mischief

arts.ttl: Rodri injury - the moment that could alter course of title?
arts.sum: A look back at the moment that could alter the course of the Premier League title, should Rodri's injury keep him out for a prolonged period.

arts.ttl: Manchester City's verdict into their legal challenge against the Premier League's sponsorship rules 'is set to be revealed over the coming days' - as Abu Dhabi-owned club claim they're victims of 'discrimination' from rivals
arts.sum: APT safeguards were introduced nearly three years ago in December 2021 following the contentious Saudi Arabian-backed takeover of Premier League club Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright calls Erling Haaland a ‘coward’ after Man City clash with Arsenal
arts.sum: John Stones’ injury-time equaliser sparked a series of confrontations at the end of an already-controversial encounter.

arts.ttl: 'No divine right': Chris Sutton now slams second Man City man alongside John Stones after his Arsenal display
arts.sum: Manchester City and Arsenal played out an entertaining 2-2 draw yesterday with plenty of talking points and Chris Sutton has picked out another Man City...

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Watford injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's EFL Cup clash between Manchester City and Watford.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland to miss Man City game after flying back to Norway
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland will not feature against Watford on Tuesday night after being given permission to attend a funeral
